overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through Night City. The journey begins in an industrial zone with graffiti-covered cooling towers and overpasses, transitions through a commercial district with large satellite dishes and neon-lit buildings, and ends with the vehicle stopping at a traffic light before entering a tunnel. The scene features a cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon signage, wet reflective roads, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cooling tower complex beneath highway overpasses

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial area beneath concrete overpasses and past massive cooling towers

entered.detail: massive industrial cooling tower covered in colorful graffiti with red warning lights on top
multi-level highway overpass structure with concrete pillars and metal railings
low-rise industrial facility with blue corrugated metal walls and small windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gritty industrial zone dominated by massive graffiti-covered cooling towers and concrete highway overpasses. The camera moves through narrow enclosed spaces beneath the infrastructure, with sparse vegetation and few pedestrians visible in this industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with satellite communication arrays and corporate signage

events.description: exits industrial cooling tower area into open commercial plaza with large satellite dishes visible against the night sky

agents.ego_description: driving through open plaza area with clear view of satellite dishes and the moon

notable_agents.action: walking along sidewalk near palm trees

entered.detail: massive satellite communication dishes with support structures silhouetted against the night sky
large illuminated billboard displaying car advertisement with red and white graphics
tall corporate building with vertical 'DASHOUND' neon signage
tall palm tree silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from enclosed industrial space to a wide-open commercial plaza. Large satellite dishes dominate the skyline alongside the DASHOUND corporate building. The moon is visible in the clear night sky as the camera moves past palm trees and illuminated billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road lined with corporate towers

events.description: begins following a pink sports car driving ahead on the main road

agents.ego_description: following a pink sports car along the palm-lined arterial road toward the DASHOUND building

notable_agents.action: pink sports car driving ahead in the same lane, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard
tall modern street lamps with linear LED lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pink sports car along a multi-lane arterial road. The DASHOUND corporate tower dominates the right side with its bright vertical signage, while palm trees and modern street lights line the left. The wet road surface reflects the neon lights of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and holographic advertising

events.description: stops at red traffic light behind the pink sports car
pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the vehicle while waiting at the red light

agents.ego_description: waiting at red traffic light while pedestrians cross the intersection in front of the vehicle

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from right to left in front of the stopped vehicle
pink sports car stopped at the red light ahead, waiting to proceed

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large digital billboard displaying green holographic advertisement with animated graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red traffic light at a busy intersection. Pedestrians cross in front of the car while a green holographic billboard glows on the right sidewalk. The pink sports car waits ahead at the light, and the DASHOUND building remains visible in the background.

events.description: enters dark tunnel underpass leaving the open intersection behind

agents.ego_description: accelerating into the dark tunnel underpass beneath the highway structure

entered.detail: dark tunnel opening beneath the highway overpass with concrete walls
massive concrete support pillars and ceiling of the highway underpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark tunnel underpass beneath the highway interchange. The environment becomes enclosed and artificially lit, with concrete walls replacing the open cityscape. The road continues straight ahead into the dimly lit tunnel, marking a transition from the vibrant commercial district to the subterranean infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a gritty industrial wasteland into a vibrant neon commercial district before descending into a subterranean tunnel. It begins by weaving through narrow, enclosed spaces beneath concrete highway overpasses and massive graffiti-covered cooling towers. As the camera emerges from the industrial zone, the environment opens into a wide commercial plaza dominated by large satellite dishes, palm trees, and the towering DASHOUND corporate building under a clear moonlit sky. The scene then shifts to a multi-lane arterial road where a pink sports car glides over wet, reflective pavement, eventually coming to a halt at a red traffic light beside a glowing green holographic billboard. Finally, the vehicle accelerates forward, leaving the bright cityscape behind as it enters a dark, artificially lit tunnel underpass beneath a highway interchange.
